title: Legal Document Template
description: Structure of a single legal document template. The `body` contains {{field_key}} placeholders that map 1:1 to entries in `fields`, which the system fills in or lets the user edit.

id.description: Unique, stable identifier matching the manifest entry and the filename (without extension).

category.description: Grouping used for browsing/filtering templates (e.g. Business, Personal, Real Estate, Employment).

description.description: Short summary of when/why this document is used.

disclaimer.description: Notice that the template is a generic starting point and not a substitute for legal advice.

fields.description: Ordered list of fillable fields referenced by the body via {{key}} tokens.

key.description: Placeholder token name, referenced in body as {{key}}.

label.description: Human-readable field label shown to the user.

type.description: Input type hint for the form-rendering system.

placeholder.description: Example value shown to guide user input.

body.description: Full document text with {{field_key}} placeholders that the system substitutes with user-provided or edited values.
